Your Onboarding Path

From application to first job.

We keep it simple. Most contractors are booking their first job within a week of applying.

1

Submit Your Application

Fill out the short application below. Tell us about your experience, your availability, and the zip codes you can serve. Takes about 5 minutes.

2

Quick Intro Call

We'll schedule a short call to review your application, answer your questions, and confirm your background check. No pressure just a conversation.

3

Background Check

We run a standard background check through our provider. This protects both you and our clients. Most results come back in 24–48 hours.

4

Platform Onboarding

We set up your cleaner profile on our booking platform, walk you through how jobs get assigned, and get your payment info connected via Stripe.

5

Start Earning

Accept jobs from your dashboard. Show up, do great work, and get paid every Friday. Simple as that.

Why Clean Relay

Built for your success.

We're not a staffing agency. You're an independent operator and we treat you like one.

Keep 65% of Every Job

No hourly wages, no tip dependency. You earn 65% of the total booking price paid out weekly every Friday directly to your bank account via Stripe.

Your Schedule, Your Rules

Set your available hours and zip codes. Accept jobs that work for you. You're not on a clock you're running your own business.

Weekly Direct Deposit

No waiting on checks. Every Friday your earnings hit your account automatically. Track your income in real time through the platform.

We Handle the Clients

You focus on cleaning. We manage booking, customer communication, payment collection, and scheduling coordination all of it.

Real Dispatcher Support

Have a last-minute issue? Can't make a job? You've got a real contact to reach not a chatbot. We work through problems together.

Local & Growing Fast

We're building right here in DFW — Mansfield, Arlington, Midlothian, and surrounding suburbs. Get in early as we expand across the metroplex.

What We're Looking For

Simple requirements. High standards.

We don't need perfection we need reliability, professionalism, and people who take pride in their work.

You Must Have

  • At least 18 years old and legally authorized to work in the US
  • Reliable transportation to reach clients in your service area
  • A smartphone to access the cleaner app and manage jobs
  • Ability to pass a standard background check
  • Your own cleaning supplies and equipment (or willingness to use client supplies)

Nice to Have

  • Prior residential or commercial cleaning experience
  • Experience with short-term rental or move-out cleans
  • Availability on weekends (high demand periods)
  • Bilingual (English / Spanish) - helpful for DFW market (not a must)

No prior experience? Don't let that stop you. If you're thorough, reliable, and professional, we'll work with you. What matters most is showing up on time and caring about the quality of your work.

Contractor Application

Clean Relay requires all independent contractors to carry active General Liability Insurance with a minimum coverage of $1,000,000. We recommend Next Insurance (nextinsurance.com) for affordable coverage starting at approximately $25/month.

By submitting, you agree to be contacted by Clean Relay regarding your application. We do not sell your information. You are applying as an independent contractor (1099), not an employee.

Application Received!

Thanks for applying to the Clean Relay network. We review every application personally and will follow up within 48 hours at the email you provided.

In the meantime, feel free to reach us at contacto@trycleanrelay.com with any questions.

Professional on-demand cleaning for DFW. Join our growing network of independent cleaners across the metroplex.
